response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems architecture at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in software practices
Active open-source contributions and infrastructure automation experience
concerns: No demonstrable 8+ years of C++ experience as required
Lacks clear experience in cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
No evidence of technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering teams
